[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

1 010100010 3
2 010101001 4
3 010100110 4
4 011001001 4
5 000000000 a
6 000000000 a
7 011100010 4

70 07 011110000 4
